action.description:
Introduced by Senators Smith, Spreitzer, Carpenter, Roys, Hesselbein, Ratcliff and Larson; 
cosponsored by Representatives Haywood, Kirsch, Udell, Andraca, Sinicki, Brown, Prado, Stubbs, Fitzgerald, Miresse, Roe, Madison, Clancy, Moore Omokunde, Joers, Snodgrass, DeSmidt, Arney, Phelps, Bare, J. Jacobson and Stroud
